testcase.name: test_checkout_status_pending

failure.message:
AssertionError: {"detail":"Erro Stripe: Unexpected error retrieving session status: 1 validation error for CheckoutStatusResponse
metadata
  Input should be a valid dictionary [type=dict_type, input_value=<StripeObject at 0xff9d7d...om/api/webhook/stripe"
}, input_type=StripeObject]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/dict_type"}
assert 502 == 200
 +  where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_integrations.py:108: in test_checkout_status_pending assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Erro Stripe: Unexpected error retrieving session status: 1 validation error for CheckoutStatusResponse
metadata
 Input should be a valid dictionary [type=dict_type, input_value=<StripeObject at 0xff9d7d...om/api/webhook/stripe"
}, input_type=StripeObject]
 For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/dict_type"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
